upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tO ha SAntahfdayO pravavrajatuH' (CAM॰u॰8.8.3) pratasTAte ityAha
'gfhRIyurapi mAtaNgAn mattAn pravrajato vane' (rA॰14.17.28) pravrajataH svacCandagatIn iti katakaH
'ajAtaSmaSravo mandAH kule jAtAH pravavrajuH' (BA॰SAM॰11.2) parivrajyAM parijagfhaturityarTaH punargfhaM prati na gantavyamiti prakarzeRa gatA iti tilakaH
'ata eva brahmacaryavAn pravrajati' (Apa॰Da॰2.21.19) pravrajati prakarzeRa vrajati na pratyAvartata ityarTaH
'dvipravrAjinI' (ASva0 gf0 156) dvo pravrajatIti puMScalIti yAvat
'rAtsyAma ityapavrajatyaDvaryuH' (ASva॰SrO॰8.13.10) apavrajati=apagacCati rAtsyAma iti sADayAma ityarTe prayogaH
'yatrEva saMvrajannanvAhAryapacanamanusmaret' (Sa0 brA0 2324) saMvrajan=vicaran=paryawan
'prapadyamAne rAjanyagreRAno'nusaMvrajet' (ASva SrO0 445)
'imA: somyAnusaMvrajeti' (CAM0 u0 445) samyaganuyAhItyAha
'putrAnsaMnizpAdya brUyurvipravrajatA'smat' (Apa0 Da0 110299) vipravrajata nAnA Bavata viviDaM prakarzeRa snehamutsfjya gacCatetyAha
'sa tvamAyuDamAdAya kzipramAvraja' (rA0 23131) Avraja=AyAhi ehi
'vESvadeve tu nivftte yadyanyo'tiTirAvrajet' (manu0 3108) ukto'rTaH
'janako ha vEdeha AsAYcakre aTa ha yAjYavalkya AvavrAja' (Sa0 brA0 146101) AvavrAja=AjagAma
'tvAmAvrajedyadi rahaH sA putra varavarRinI' (BA0 Adi0 9721) Avrajet upeyAt
'sa punarhfdayaM kasya krUrasyApi na nirdahet kasya hyakaruRasyApi netrAByAmaSrunAvrajet' (BA0 sO0 428).. Avrajet pravahet syandeta
'apareRa vedimativrajya' (ASva0 SrO0 2311) ativrajya laNGayitvA
'aDyAyamudavrajat' (paYca0 brA0 121110) aDyayanAya niragAdityarTaH
'yeneto gacCeyuranyena pratyAvrajeyuH' (lAwyA0 SrO0 4417) pratyAvrajeyuH pratyAvarteran
'madrakezu carakAH paryavrajAma' (Sa0 brA0 14621) paryavrajAma paryAwAma
'asyAH pawavAsaganDenonmattA Bramanto maDukaragaRAScUtaSiKarARyapi tyaktvA parivrajanti KalvenAm' (uBayA0 pf0 6) parivrajanti paripatanti
'putrasyESvarye pitA vaset pari vA vrajet' (kOzI0 u0 215) parivrajet saMnyasyet aniketano BikzuH syAt
gfhI BUtvA vanI Bavet vanI BUtvA parivrajet' (nA0 pari0 u0 377 pAWaBedaH)
'devatA vA etaM parivrajanti' (paYca0 brA0 18111) parivrajanti parivarjayanti nAsya havirAdadata ityarTaH
'SivamahaM SaraRaM parivrajAmi' (skanda pu0 ke0 9128) vrajAmItyevArTaH parirasTAne
'vAsAMsi matacelAni… parivrajyA ca nityaSaH' (manu0 1052) parivrajyA BramaRaSIlatvam parivrajyA saMnyAsaH caturTASramapraveSopi Bavati parivrAjakaSca saMnyAsI
'tamindra upavrajyovAca' (tE0 brA0 310113) upavrajya upetya
'na tApasEH… AkIrRaM BikzukErvAnyErAgAramupasaMvrajet' (manu0 651) upasaMvrajet praviSet

prayoga.literature_text: rAjan svatejasA tasya saSarIro divaM vraja
